# Copilot Instructions

## Project overview

This repository is a fork of [telepath9/ESPclock](https://github.com/telepath9/ESPclock).
The entire codebase is licensed under the
[GNU General Public License v3.0 (GPL-3.0)](../LICENSE).

---

## GPL-3.0 compliance rules

All code contributions — whether written by a human or generated by Copilot —
**must** comply with GPL-3.0.  Follow the rules below whenever you create or
modify files in this repository.

### 1. Source-file license headers

Every new source file (`.cpp`, `.h`, `.c`, `.py`, `.js`, `.html`, or similar)
**must** begin with a license header.  Use the block that matches the file's
comment syntax.

**C / C++ / JavaScript (line comments):**
```cpp
// ESPclock - <short description of this file's role>
// This file is part of the ESPclock project fork by nltimv.
// Originally written by telepath9 (https://github.com/telepath9/ESPclock)
// Licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0 (GPL-3.0)
// SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-or-later
//
// This file has been modified by nltimv (https://github.com/nltimv).
```

**HTML / XML (block comments):**
```html
<!--
  ESPclock - <short description of this file's role>
  This file is part of the ESPclock project fork by nltimv.
  Originally written by telepath9 (https://github.com/telepath9/ESPclock)
  Licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0 (GPL-3.0)
  SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-or-later

  This file has been modified by nltimv (https://github.com/nltimv).
-->
```

When **modifying** an existing file that already has the header above, do not
add a second header — the existing header is sufficient.

If you modify a file that was taken verbatim from the upstream repository and
has **no** license header yet, add the appropriate header as the first edit.

### 2. Never introduce incompatible dependencies

GPL-3.0 is a strong copyleft licence.  Do not add libraries or dependencies
whose licences are **incompatible** with GPL-3.0.  Compatible licences include
(but are not limited to): GPL-2.0+, GPL-3.0, LGPL-2.1+, MIT, BSD-2/3-Clause,
Apache-2.0 (when combined with GPL-3.0 — note: Apache-2.0 is *not* compatible
with plain GPL-2.0), ISC, and the Unlicense.

Licences that are **incompatible** with GPL-3.0 and must be avoided include:
proprietary / closed-source licences, SSPL, Commons Clause, and any licence
that restricts redistribution or modification.

When in doubt, check the [SPDX licence list](https://spdx.org/licenses/) and
the [GPL compatibility table](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/license-list.html)
before adding a dependency.

### 3. Preserve copyright and attribution notices

- Do **not** remove, obscure, or alter any existing copyright notices or
  author attributions already present in the source files.
- When copying or adapting a significant portion of code from another
  GPL-compatible open-source project, retain that project's copyright notice
  and add a comment stating where the code originated.

### 4. Keep source available

GPL-3.0 requires that the complete corresponding source code is made available
to anyone who receives a binary.  Concretely:

- Do not embed pre-compiled binaries without also providing (or linking to)
  their full source.
- Do not add build steps that strip or obfuscate source in a way that prevents
  a user from modifying and recompiling the firmware.

### 5. Document changes in CHANGES.md

Every non-trivial change introduced in this fork must be recorded in
[CHANGES.md](../CHANGES.md) under a dated heading.  This satisfies the GPL-3.0
requirement to clearly mark modifications.  Follow the existing format:
keep entries at a high level (like current `CHANGES.md` entries), and avoid
low-level implementation detail or step-by-step notes.

```markdown
## YYYY-MM-DD

### <Component or file path>
- Brief description of what was changed and why.
```

### 6. New files created from scratch

When Copilot generates an entirely new file (not adapted from upstream), that
file is still part of this GPL-3.0 project.  Add the appropriate header from
rule 1, and note the new file in `CHANGES.md`.

---

## Summary checklist

Before finalising any change, verify:

- [ ] Every new or modified source file has the correct GPL-3.0 header.
- [ ] No incompatible-licence dependency has been introduced.
- [ ] Existing copyright and attribution notices are intact.
- [ ] `CHANGES.md` has been updated with a description of the change.
- [ ] No pre-compiled binaries have been added without corresponding source.
